            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_fighters_y1910_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_engine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { aircraft_engine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_tech = aircraft_engine
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = turbocharger }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { turbocharger = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_tech = aircraft_engine
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_tech = aerial_bombs
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }

        }
    }

            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933_great_war_redux = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_transport_y1933_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1900_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { generator_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_computing_machine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_decryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { machine_tools3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_equipment_conversion }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { cavity_magnatron = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            }
            set_technology = { advanced_rocket_engines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1880_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ironclad_coal_engine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ironclad_coal_engine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1890_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1905_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1914_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1915_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1916_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1917_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1918_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1939_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1941_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1942_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1890_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { early_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1905_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_field_gun }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { basic_field_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_howitzer }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_field_gun2 }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

                has_tech = basic_howitzer

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_tech = basic_howitzer
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_dp_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = artillery2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { artillery2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_dp_light_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_dp_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1917_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1919_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1920_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1917_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}












































arm_grant_land_infantry_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1890_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1904_great_war_redux = yes

            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1910_great_war_redux = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1890_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = machine_guns }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { machine_guns = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_infantry_weapons3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_infantry_weapons3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1917_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1919_great_war_redux = yes
        }

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1917_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1942_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

    }

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1917_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_tech = tank_design
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_tech = magneto_ignition

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_support_y1880_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_railways }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { basic_railways = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = poisonous_gas_projector_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { poisonous_gas_projector_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1900_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1900_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_armored_car_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuhrer_turret_improvement }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_tech = tank_classification
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { fuhrer_turret_improvement = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = defensive_assets }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            set_technology = { defensive_assets = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

                NOT = { has_tech = NOR_rikstanken_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { NOR_rikstanken_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1880_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1890_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1904_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1908 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1908_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1914_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1916_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
