arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1880_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ironclad_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ironclad_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1916_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1910_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_tech = scout_plane
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1916_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1880_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1890_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1904_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1914_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1916_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

                NOT = { has_tech = torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }

    }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1910_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1880_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1904_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1905_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1912_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1880_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ironclad_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ironclad_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_secondary_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_secondary_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_torpedo_tubes }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_torpedo_tubes = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1880 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1910_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            }
            set_technology = { airship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airship_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airdrop_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines_bba }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airdrop_mines_bba = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airsweep_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines_bba }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airsweep_mines_bba = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1904_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1910_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1916_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943_great_war_redux = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944_great_war_redux = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1904_great_war_redux = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1904 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_tech = basic_torpedo
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_great_war_redux = 1 }
        }
    }
}
